subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Firmness and constancy in the divine Covenant are manifest and evident through deeds, actions and the sacrifice of life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان ثبوت و رسوخ بر عهد الهی باعمال و افعال و جانفشانی واضح و مشهود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
